name: Stilta
long_description:
Stilta builds agentic AI software for patents. It runs search and analysis at a scale and depth that existing methods can't match - in minutes rather than weeks, finding evidence others miss where the stakes are the highest. 

Innovation is key to solving the world's most important challenges, but the tools that protect it haven't kept pace. Patent attorneys do high-stakes work with a process still built on manual document review and disconnected point solutions. Generative AI helps with drafting, but it doesn't deliver the trust and transparency that legal-grade work demands - no sources, no traceability, no audit trail. Stilta takes a different approach. We use agentic AI to run search and analysis at a scale manual methods can't match, with every output source-backed, referenced, and auditable. This has not been technically possible until a few months ago. 

We're four engineers from McKinsey/QuantumBlack who built and deployed AI systems at some of the world's largest organizations. With Stilta, we're equipping the patent practitioners working with the world's most valuable ideas with tools that match the stakes. Our customers include leading firms in both Europe and the US.
